persona: Low-profile, adventurous traveller drawn to coastal and remote places. Core interests: surfing, ocean, nature, local culture. Nomadic at heart — values authenticity over tourist infrastructure. Occasionally splurges on a high-end tropical resort when conditions are right for the season. Avoids peak crowds and tourist traps. Prefers small towns, hidden beaches, and places with real character over well-trodden destinations.
luxury_exceptions: High-end tropical resorts are valid when: the season is peak-quality for surf or diving, the destination is genuinely remote or exclusive, and the price is justified by the experience.
